Featured Project

VaporLogicAI

A control-focused concept for improving corrugated board flatness with smarter zone-based spray control.

WorkEngineeringDesign
Back Home

Overview

This project explores a water spraying system for corrugated paper manufacturing using atomizing nozzles, air and water control, and future feedback-driven tuning. It is a strong example of mechanical, controls, and product-thinking overlap.
